indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_inventory_audit_entry_deleted_at" ON "trading_card_inventory_audit_entry" ("deleted_at") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_inventory_snapshot_single_applying" ON "trading_card_inventory_snapshot" ("inventory_source_id") WHERE status = 'APPLYING' and deleted_at is null

checks.name: CK_trading_card_inventory_snapshot_approved_consistency
checks.expression: (approved_by is null and approved_at is null) or (approved_by is not null and approved_at is not null)
checks.definition: check (((approved_by is null and approved_at is null) or (approved_by is not null and approved_at is not null)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_inventory_snapshot_rejected_consistency
checks.expression: (rejected_by is null and rejected_at is null) or (rejected_by is not null and rejected_at is not null)
checks.definition: check (((rejected_by is null and rejected_at is null) or (rejected_by is not null and rejected_at is not null)))

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IDX_trading_card_inventory_proposal_variant" ON "trading_card_inventory_proposal" ("trading_card_variant_id") WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

checks.name: CK_trading_card_inventory_proposal_quantities_non_negative
checks.expression: (proposed_quantity is null or proposed_quantity >= 0) and (previous_quantity is null or previous_quantity >= 0)
checks.definition: check (((proposed_quantity is null or proposed_quantity >= 0) and (previous_quantity is null or previous_quantity >= 0)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_inventory_proposal_amounts_require_currency
checks.expression: (proposed_unit_acquisition_cost is null and proposed_unit_market_price is null and proposed_unit_selling_price is null) or currency_code is not null
checks.definition: check (((proposed_unit_acquisition_cost is null and proposed_unit_market_price is null and proposed_unit_selling_price is null) or currency_code is not null))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_inventory_proposal_resolved_consistency
checks.expression: (review_status = 'PENDING' and resolved_by is null and resolved_at is null) or (review_status <> 'PENDING' and resolved_by is not null and resolved_at is not null)
checks.definition: check (((review_status = 'PENDING' and resolved_by is null and resolved_at is null) or (review_status <> 'PENDING' and resolved_by is not null and resolved_at is not null)))

checks.name: CK_trading_card_inventory_proposal_unresolved_variant_kind
checks.expression: trading_card_variant_id is not null or change_kind = 'UNRESOLVED_VARIANT'
checks.definition: check ((trading_card_variant_id is not null or change_kind = 'UNRESOLVED_VARIANT'))

checks.name: CK_tci_proposal_applied_consistency
checks.expression: (review_status = 'APPLIED' and applied_at is not null and applied_transaction_id is not null and applied_holding_id is not null and application_idempotency_key is not null and medusa_sync_status in ('PENDING', 'SYNCED', 'FAILED')) or (review_status <> 'APPLIED' and applied_at is null and applied_transaction_id is null and applied_holding_id is null and application_idempotency_key is null and medusa_sync_status = 'NOT_APPLICABLE')
checks.definition: check (((review_status = 'APPLIED' and applied_at is not null and applied_transaction_id is not null and applied_holding_id is not null and application_idempotency_key is not null and medusa_sync_status in ('PENDING', 'SYNCED', 'FAILED')) or (review_status <> 'APPLIED' and applied_at is null and applied_transaction_id is null and applied_holding_id is null and application_idempotency_key is null and medusa_sync_status = 'NOT_APPLICABLE')))

checks.name: CK_tci_proposal_medusa_attempt_token_scope
checks.expression: medusa_sync_attempt_token is null or (review_status = 'APPLIED' and medusa_sync_status = 'PENDING')
checks.definition: check ((medusa_sync_attempt_token is null or (review_status = 'APPLIED' and medusa_sync_status = 'PENDING')))

checks.name: CK_tci_proposal_category_confirmation_consistency
checks.expression: (confirmed_ebay_store_category_id is null and category_confirmed_at is null and category_confirmed_by is null) or (confirmed_ebay_store_category_id is not null and category_confirmed_at is not null and category_confirmed_by is not null)
checks.definition: check (((confirmed_ebay_store_category_id is null and category_confirmed_at is null and category_confirmed_by is null) or (confirmed_ebay_store_category_id is not null and category_confirmed_at is not null and category_confirmed_by is not null)))
